Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM topics WHERE event_url LIKE '%r=adul%';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM topics WHERE event_url LIKE '%via=serene%';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT DISTINCT teams FROM topics WHERE line='单场' AND teams != '[]' AND teams IS NOT NULL;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM topics WHERE direction IS NOT NULL AND direction != 'null';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, direction FROM topics WHERE direction IS NOT NULL AND direction != 'null' LIMIT 6;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, direction FROM topics WHERE direction IS NOT NULL AND direction != 'null' LIMIT 8;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT outcomes FROM topics WHERE title LIKE '%More Markets%' AND title LIKE '%Mexico%' LIMIT 1;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, direction FROM topics WHERE line='长盘' AND direction IS NOT NULL AND direction!='null' LIMIT 6;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM topics WHERE direction IS NOT NULL AND direction!='null';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT category, COUNT\(*\), ROUND\(SUM\(volume\)\) FROM topics WHERE line='长盘' GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM\(volume\) ASC;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, ROUND\(volume\) v, ROUND\(liquidity\) l FROM topics WHERE line='长盘' AND \(category LIKE '%花边%' OR category LIKE '%球员%' OR category LIKE '%纪录%' OR category LIKE '%大洲%' OR category LIKE '%个人奖项%'\) ORDER BY volume ASC LIMIT 40;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT category, COUNT\(*\) FROM topics WHERE category IN \('11小组头名','12大洲夺冠','13球员参赛','14赛事变动'\) GROUP BY category;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, direction FROM topics WHERE category='11小组头名' AND direction!='null' LIMIT 4;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, ROUND\(price*100\)||'%' FROM topics WHERE category='13球员参赛';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT category, COUNT\(*\) c, ROUND\(AVG\(volume\)\) av FROM topics WHERE line='长盘' GROUP BY category ORDER BY c DESC;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, ROUND\(volume\) FROM topics WHERE title LIKE '%H2H%' ORDER BY volume;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT DISTINCT title FROM topics WHERE title LIKE '%H2H%' OR title LIKE '%play in the World Cup%' OR title LIKE '%Penalt%' OR title LIKE '%Free Kick%' OR title LIKE '%Hat Trick%' OR title LIKE '%to Score%';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, bet_type, outcomes FROM topics WHERE title LIKE '%H2H: Yamal%';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/wcp.db "SELECT title, direction FROM topics WHERE bet_type='球员H2H' AND direction!='null';")
